name: Total Lunar Eclipse
visibility: Pacific, Americas, Western Europe, Western Africa
description: Total lunar eclipse with 1h05m totality. Blood moon visible across the Americas.
significance: Total lunar eclipses amplify transformation energy. The moon passes fully through Earth's shadow — death and rebirth. Peak time for releasing old patterns.

name: Partial Solar Eclipse
description: Partial solar eclipse visible across Europe and Northern Africa.
significance: Solar eclipses mark powerful new beginnings. Even partial eclipses carry seed energy — set intentions during this window.

name: Total Lunar Eclipse
description: Total lunar eclipse with 1h22m totality. Deep blood moon visible from Europe through Asia.
significance: The second total lunar eclipse of 2025. Harvest moon energy meets eclipse intensity. Emotional clarity peaks under the shadow.

name: Partial Solar Eclipse
description: Partial solar eclipse visible in the Southern Pacific region.
significance: New moon solar eclipse — planting seeds of transformation in the subconscious mind.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon — moon at near-perigee distance. Appears brighter and larger than typical full moons.
significance: Supermoons intensify lunar influence. Gravitational pull peaks — expect heightened energy, vivid dreams, and stronger urges. Stay disciplined.

name: Supermoon
description: Closest full supermoon of 2025. Moon at approximately 356,980 km from Earth.
significance: The closest and most powerful supermoon of 2025. Maximum gravitational influence. Channel the intensity into your practice.

name: Supermoon
description: Final supermoon of 2025. Cold Moon supermoon.
significance: Year-end supermoon. Reflect on your annual journey and set intentions for the cycles ahead.

name: Supermoon · Perihelion Alignment
description: Full supermoon coinciding with Earth's perihelion. This alignment hasn't occurred since January 1912.
significance: Exceptionally rare alignment — Earth, Moon, and Sun all at their closest. Triple gravitational intensity. The most energetically charged moon to open 2026.

name: Annular Solar Eclipse
description: Annular solar eclipse producing a ring of fire effect. Limited visibility from inhabited areas.
significance: Ring of fire eclipses represent contained power — energy held in perfect tension. A potent day for focused transmutation work.

name: Total Lunar Eclipse · Blood Moon
description: Total lunar eclipse with 58m totality. Last total lunar eclipse until December 31, 2028.
significance: The final blood moon for nearly 3 years. Whatever you've been holding onto — this eclipse demands release. The next total lunar eclipse isn't until late 2028.

name: Total Solar Eclipse
description: Total solar eclipse visible across parts of Europe. Partial eclipse visible across Europe, Africa, and North America.
significance: Total solar eclipses are the most powerful reset points in the lunar calendar. Complete momentary darkness — the cosmos pressing pause.

name: Deep Partial Lunar Eclipse
description: Deep partial lunar eclipse with 93% of the moon entering Earth's umbral shadow.
significance: At 93% coverage, this partial eclipse shows dramatic darkening and reddish coloring. Nearly total — the tension between light and shadow mirrors internal struggle.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon in late November. Moon at near-perigee distance.
significance: Late-year supermoon amplifies reflective energy. End-of-cycle awareness heightened under this magnified full moon.

name: Supermoon
description: Closest full supermoon of 2026 at approximately 356,740 km.
significance: The most powerful supermoon of 2026. Gravitational influence peaks. Solstice-season supermoon carries completion and renewal energy simultaneously.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon in late January. Moon near perigee.
significance: New year supermoon. Use this amplified energy to lock in your intentions for the year ahead.

name: Annular Solar Eclipse
description: Annular ring of fire solar eclipse visible from parts of South America and Southern Africa.
significance: Ring of fire — contained power. New moon eclipse energy is seed energy. Plant wisely.

name: Penumbral Lunar Eclipse
description: Penumbral lunar eclipse — subtle darkening as the full moon passes through Earth's outer shadow.
significance: Penumbral eclipses are subtle but real. A faint shadow crosses the moon — the universe whispering rather than shouting.

name: Total Solar Eclipse · Eclipse of the Century
visibility: Spain, North Africa, Egypt, Saudi Arabia
description: Total solar eclipse with 6m23s of totality — dubbed the eclipse of the century.
significance: Over 6 minutes of totality — the longest total solar eclipse in decades. Extended darkness during the day is a portal. Use it.

name: Penumbral Lunar Eclipse
description: Penumbral lunar eclipse. Subtle darkening visible from the Pacific and Americas.
significance: A quiet penumbral eclipse — the second in a paired eclipse season. Subtle shifts in awareness are still shifts.

name: Partial Lunar Eclipse · Supermoon
description: Shallow partial lunar eclipse with 6.6% coverage coinciding with a full supermoon.
significance: Supermoon meets eclipse — amplified intensity collides with shadow work. A rare double event demanding both power and introspection.

name: Annular Solar Eclipse
visibility: Eastern South America, Western Africa, Spain, Portugal
description: Annular solar eclipse visible across the Atlantic region.
significance: Ring of fire over the Atlantic. New moon eclipse energy concentrated — transformation seeds planted now grow exponentially.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon in February 2028.
significance: Back-to-back supermoons to start 2028. Sustained lunar amplification — your practice is being tested and strengthened.

name: Supermoon
description: Third consecutive full supermoon of early 2028.
significance: Three supermoons in three months. Rare sustained intensity. If you've held your streak through this gauntlet, your foundation is unshakable.

name: Partial Lunar Eclipse
description: Partial lunar eclipse with 39% of the moon in Earth's umbral shadow.
significance: Enough coverage to darken part of the full moon visibly. Partial shadow, partial revelation. What's still hidden?

name: Total Solar Eclipse
description: Total solar eclipse visible across Australia and New Zealand with over 5 minutes of totality.
significance: Total darkness over Australia. Solar eclipses reset the electromagnetic field. Those in the path experience a measurable shift.

name: Total Lunar Eclipse · Blood Moon
description: Total lunar eclipse with 1h11m totality. First total since March 2026. New Year's Eve blood moon.
significance: After nearly 3 years without a total lunar eclipse, the blood moon returns on the final night of 2028. Maximum release energy.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon in late February 2029.
significance: First full supermoon of 2029. Winter supermoons carry deep, introspective amplification.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon in late March 2029.
significance: Spring equinox supermoon energy — growth and amplification aligned.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon in late April 2029.
significance: Third consecutive supermoon. Sustained perigee full moons demand sustained discipline.

name: Total Lunar Eclipse · Blood Moon
description: Total lunar eclipse with 1h42m totality — one of the longest of the decade. Umbral magnitude 1.844.
significance: Nearly 2 hours of totality — the deepest total lunar eclipse of the decade. The moon will appear intensely red. Maximum transformation.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon in early October 2029. Harvest Moon supermoon.
significance: Harvest supermoon — the culmination of effort. What you've cultivated through your practice becomes visible to others.

name: Total Lunar Eclipse · Blood Moon
description: Total lunar eclipse with 54m totality. Solstice-adjacent blood moon.
significance: Blood moon near the winter solstice — the longest night meets the deepest shadow. Powerful convergence for the retention path.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon in mid-April 2030.
significance: Spring supermoon. Amplified growth energy aligns with the season of renewal.

name: Supermoon
description: Full supermoon in mid-May 2030.
significance: Back-to-back spring supermoons. Sustained intensity through the growing season.

name: Annular Solar Eclipse
visibility: North Africa, Greece, Turkey, Russia, Japan, Pacific NW US
description: Annular ring of fire solar eclipse with a wide visibility path.
significance: A widely visible ring of fire. New moon eclipse energy available to much of the Northern Hemisphere. Set powerful intentions.

name: Partial Lunar Eclipse · Supermoon
description: Partial lunar eclipse with 50% coverage coinciding with a full supermoon.
significance: Supermoon plus partial eclipse. Half the moon in shadow, half in light — the duality of your practice made visible.

name: Total Solar Eclipse
visibility: Southern Africa, Southern Indian Ocean, Australia
description: Total solar eclipse visible across Southern Africa and Australia.
significance: Year-end total solar eclipse. The most powerful reset energy of 2030. Darkness before the light of a new cycle.
